titlePlaceholder: e.g. Bring me to your favorite hidden coffee spot

returnClauseTemplates.culture: ...and we meet up to talk about it 🎭
returnClauseTemplates.help: ...and we meet up so I can help in person 🙏

deleteBody: This removes the challenge for everyone. This cannot be undone.
shareInvite: Take on this challenge with me!

examples.label: Need ideas? Tap one
food: Find me the best coffee in town
Best street food spot near here
place: Show me the best sunset spot
Where you go to clear your head
culture: A real local music night this weekend
A local show I will remember
help: A haircut spot that won’t ruin my week
Where to fix a phone screen

not_creator.title: It's your own challenge
not_creator.body: You created this challenge - wait for someone else to accept it.

mode_required.title: Pick local or traveler first
mode_required.body: Set your mode in your profile before accepting challenges.

mode_mismatch.title: Wrong side of the challenge
mode_mismatch.body: Switch your mode in your profile if you want to take this on.

in_progress.title: Someone's on this one
in_progress.body: Another traveler is taking it on right now. Check back when they wrap up - the challenge frees up.

scoringInfo.title: 🏆 How challenges work
scoringInfo.intro: Each challenge earns points for both sides - they roll up into your city + world leaderboards.
scoringInfo.footnote: Points are awarded only when both parties rate the meet-up.

types.heading: 🎯 Two ways to play
types.local: 🏙️ Local - in your city. Meet up IRL to make it count.
types.international: 🌍 International - across cities. Snap an instant photo as proof.

lifecycle.heading: 🔁 One run at a time
lifecycle.body: When the taker wraps up, the chat resets - challenge stays, ready for the next adventurer.

join.gateBody: Enter as a spectator to follow the conversation and cheer the taker on.
join.errKicked: You've been removed from this challenge.
join.errClosed: This challenge is closed to new joins.

members.title: In the channel
members.empty: Nobody's joined yet - be the first.

thread.empty: Be the first to say something.
thread.emptyIntl: Say hi 👋 - drop a 📸 when you nail it.

cancel.body: The thread and chat will be deleted. You can re-accept later if you change your mind.

cancelledByOther.title: Thread cancelled
cancelledByOther.body: The other person cancelled this take-on.

empty.title: No active threads
empty.body: When you accept a challenge or someone accepts yours, the conversation shows up here.

guestGate.title: Sign in to see threads
guestGate.body: Threads are 1:1 conversations between you and the challenger. You need an account to start one.

ratePrompts.errSubmit: Couldn't submit your rating. Try again.

leaderboard.title: 🏆 Leaderboard

me.unranked: Take a challenge to get on the board

empty.title: Nobody's on the board yet
empty.body: Be the first to take a challenge and earn points.

leaderboard.errLoad: Couldn't load the leaderboard. Pull to retry.

withdraw.title: Withdraw proposal?
withdraw.body: Your proposed date will be cleared. They'll be notified.

picker.title: When are you meeting?
picker.endAfterStart: End time must be after start.
picker.wherePlaceholder: e.g. Le Comptoir, 17 rue de la Paix

err.proposeFailed: Couldn't propose the date. Try again.

approve.title: Mark as accomplished?
approve.body: This is final - you can't change it after.

reject.title: Close without verdict?
reject.body: Use this if the meetup didn't really happen. This is final.

subcta.creatorWaiting: Waiting for someone to take it on
subcta.dateAwaiting: Waiting for the creator to approve

creator.pendingTitle: {{name}} wants to take on your challenge
creator.pendingBody: Accept to start chatting and planning the meet-up, or reject to free the slot.

acceptor.waitingBody: {{name}} will accept or reject your take-on. You'll get a push when they decide.
acceptor.rejectedBody: {{name}} declined this one. You can still pick another challenge.

postCreate.title: Your challenge is live
postCreate.subtitle: Now seed it - get someone to take it on in the next hour.
postCreate.ctaInviteSub: Pick a few {{audience}} - we'll ping them.
postCreate.pickerSubtitle: Tap to select. They get a push with Accept / Ignore.
postCreate.pickerEmpty: No {{audience}} around right now. Share it externally instead.
postCreate.sentSubtitle: They'll get a push notification now.
postCreate.pickerSubtitleAll: No exact match - showing everyone in {{city}}.

visitor.title: Take on the challenge to unlock the chat
visitor.body: Once you accept, you and the challenger get a private thread to plan your meet-up.

creator.title: Waiting for someone to take it on
creator.body: When a traveler accepts, you'll chat with them right here to plan your meet-up.

full.title: Challenge full
full.body: All spots are taken. Check back if someone drops out.

inProgress.title: Someone's on this one right now
inProgress.body: A traveler is taking on this challenge. When they wrap up, it'll be free again - check back soon.

typeFilter.label: Filter by type
typeFilter.empty: Nothing in this category right now.

mode.label: Mode
mode.localHint: In your city. Ends with an in-person meetup.
mode.internationalHint: Anywhere in the world. They send proof, you validate from afar.

visibility.label: Who can see this?
visibility.publicHint: Anyone in the city can see and accept this.
visibility.friendsHint: Only your friends and people you invite can see this.
visibility.moderationBlocked: Your text was flagged - please rephrase.

optin.title: Heads up - this is public
optin.body: Public challenges show up in the city feed and on the public web. Your name and your challenge text will be visible to anyone - including non-members and search engines. You can flip to Friends below if you'd rather keep it tighter.

intl.targetCityHint: Leave as Anywhere to reach travelers everywhere, or pick a city for a focused fan-out.
intl.proofRequirementsPlaceholder: e.g. The dish in daylight, with you in frame
intl.proofRequirementsHint: The proof is a photo 📸. The acceptor sees this before submitting - be specific.

proof.rejectModalHint: They have {{count}} attempt(s) left. Tell them what to fix.
proof.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Photo is too blurry, can't see the dish
proof.reasonRequiredBody: A short reason (1–200 chars) helps the acceptor.
proof.permPhotoBody: Enable camera access in Settings - the proof has to be a fresh photo.
proof.permGpsBody: Geotag is mandatory. Enable location in Settings.
proof.gpsFailBody: Try again outdoors or with location services on.
proof.submitFailBody: Check your connection and try again.

rank.cityBeyond: Outside the top {{topN}} in your city
